query:
INSERT INTO savedQuotes (
  quoteName, clientName, clientCompany, contactEmail, contactPhone,
  facilityId, monthlyPallets, storageRate, handlingInRate, handlingOutRate,
  monthlyMinimum, casePickRate, layerPickRate, palletSupplyRate, shrinkWrapRate,
  labelingFee, orderProcessingFee, cancellationFee,
  oosLaborStandard, oosLaborWeekend,
  customDisclosures, lockedPdfUrl,
  productDescription, accountOverview, palletStacking, orderProcessingTime,
  vasToggleCasePick, vasToggleLayerPick, vasTogglePalletSupply,
  vasToggleShrinkWrap, vasToggleLabeling, vasToggleOrderProcessing, vasToggleCancellation,
  tier1Name, tier1Discount, tier1Term, tier1Enabled,
  tier2Name, tier2Discount, tier2Term, tier2Enabled,
  tier3Name, tier3Discount, tier3Term, tier3Enabled,
  tier4Name, tier4Discount, tier4Term, tier4Enabled,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Write-Off - Ecom Fulfillment - 3/24/2026',
  'Lauren', 'Write-Off', '', '',
  'SC-577', 100, 14.19, 6.25, 6.25,
  1000, 0.40, 0.30, 9.00, 3.00,
  0.25, 7.00, 25.00,
  40, 75,
  'First 3 months: $500 monthly minimum. Volume ramp-up expected May/June. Repack case rate based on 6 boxes of 4 packs per tray. Packing materials supplied by Write-Off. New customer onboarding fee: $1,500.',
  'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/93927875/jGMAb8b3KCDFhyaTLpjNrM/WriteOff_LM_Proposal_2fb47264.pdf',
  'Canned Cocktails / RTD Spirits',
  'L&M Distribution & Logistics is pleased to present this warehousing services proposal for Write-Off. Based on the information shared, we have structured pricing to support your initial launch volumes and scale with you as inventory and order activity increase. Our Rock Hill, SC facility provides efficient FedEx access and full WMS visibility through our in-house Connect platform.',
  '8 tiers / 104 cases per pallet',
  '48-hour notice required',
  1, 0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1,
  'Standard', 0, '12', 1,
  '', 0, '', 0,
  '', 0, '', 0,
  '', 0, '', 0,
  NOW(), NOW()
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user jfVduGqim3ALTGy.08e762350d2b --database jGMAb8b3KCDFhyaTLpjNrM --execute INSERT INTO savedQuotes (

  tier3Name, tier3Discount, tier3Term, tier3Enabled,
  tier4Name, tier4Discount, tier4Term, tier4Enabled,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'Write-Off - Ecom Fulfillment - 3/24/2026',
  'Lauren', 'Write-Off', '', '',
  'SC-577', 100, 14.19, 6.25, 6.25,
  1000, 0.40, 0.30, 9.00, 3.00,

  40, 75,
  'First 3 months: $500 monthly minimum. Volume ramp-up expected May/June. Repack case rate based on 6 boxes of 4 packs per tray. Packing materials supplied by Write-Off. New customer onboarding fee: $1,500.',
  'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/93927875/jGMAb8b3KCDFhyaTLpjNrM/WriteOff_LM_Proposal_2fb47264.pdf',
  'Canned Cocktails / RTD Spirits',
  'L&M Distribution & Logistics is pleased to present this warehousing services proposal for Write-Off. Based on the information shared, we have structured pricing to support your initial launch volumes and scale with you as inventory and order activity increase. Our Rock Hill, SC facility provides efficient FedEx access and full WMS visibility through our in-house Connect platform.',
  '8 tiers / 104 cases per pallet',
  '48-hour notice required',
  1, 0, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1,
  'Standard', 0, '12', 1,
  '', 0, '', 0,
  '', 0, '', 0,
  '', 0, '', 0,
